evals.name: casual-patch-bump
evals.prompt: ok time to cut 3.9.2, there was that small edge timeout fix we landed last week and I'd like it out today. can you do the release?
evals.expected_output: A release cut from 3.9.1 to 3.9.2: both APP_VERSION and #define MyAppVersion bumped, README links updated, one release commit, tag v3.9.2 pushed, CI monitored, live release verified to contain SHA-256 in body and sidecar asset.

evals.name: vague-ship-request
evals.expected_output: Assistant asks which version bump (patch / minor / major) and what's going in the release before touching anything. Does not invent a version number.

evals.name: explicit-minor-bump
evals.prompt: bump to 3.10.0 for the new English Grandmom and the VoxCPM2 engine slot, then push and watch CI
evals.expected_output: A full release cut to 3.10.0: version strings synced across auto_updater.py and setup.iss, README download links updated, release commit, tag v3.10.0 pushed, CI run watched through to green, live release body + sidecar verified.
